heading: Funding
label: 6107 Funding
text: Of the amounts made available under section 60125(a)(1), the Secretary shall expend $1,058,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2023 to carry out section 6106.
notes: Amendments2020— substituted “$1,058,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2023” for “$1,058,000 for each of fiscal years 2016 through 2019”.Pub. L. 116–2602016— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows:Pub. L. 114–183“(a) .—There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to provide grants to States under section 6106 $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2012 through 2015. Such funds shall remain available until expended.For Grants to States“(b) .—There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary such sums as may be necessary to carry out sections 6103, 6104, and 6105 for fiscal years 2012 through 2015.”For Administration2012—Subsecs. (a), (b). , (2), substituted “2012 through 2015.” for “2007 through 2010.”Pub. L. 112–90, § 32(c)(1)Subsec. (c). , struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “Any sums appropriated under this section shall be derived from general revenues and may not be derived from amounts collected under .”Pub. L. 112–90, § 32(c)(3)section 60301 of this title2006—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “fiscal years 2007 through 2010” for “fiscal years 2003 through 2006”.Pub. L. 109–4682002—Subsec. (a). , substituted “$1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2003 through 2006” for “$1,000,000 for fiscal year 2000 and $5,000,000 for fiscal year 2001” in first sentence.Pub. L. 107–355, § 2(d)(1)Subsec. (b). , substituted “for fiscal years 2003 through 2006” for “for fiscal years 1999, 2000, and 2001”.Pub. L. 107–355, § 2(d)(2)
